event_description: Fired when a user successfully completes sign up via Supabase auth.
Fired when a user successfully signs in with email and password.
Fired when a login attempt fails due to invalid credentials or other error.
Fired when the authenticated user clicks the logout button in the header.
Fired when a visitor clicks the Explore Events button on the home page.
Fired when a visitor clicks on an event card to view its details.
Fired when a user clicks the Add to Cart button.
Fired when an admin successfully creates a new user record in the users table.
Fired when an admin successfully updates an existing user record.
Fired when an admin confirms and deletes a user record from the users table.
